article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Jan 25, 2023 (BSS) - The International Customs Day will be observed in the country tomorrow as elsewhere in the world with the theme "Nurturing the next generation: promoting a culture of knowledge-sharing and professional pride in Customs".

Marking the day, the National Board of Revenue (NBR) will organize a seminar at 11.30am tomorrow at a hotel in the city.

Finance Minister AHM Mustafa Kamal will attend the seminar with Senior Secretary of Internal Resources Davison (IRD) and NBR Cha

llm_connections.evidence_quote: Bangladesh customs has significant contributions to improve the living standard of people by expanding foreign trade and investment
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article attributes national-level expansion of 'foreign trade and investment' to Bangladesh Customs, which matches the imports feature's country-wide trade scope (export-import).
